headline: US rig count down nine as prices increase
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was down two this week, the latest count Friday by Baker Hughes shows, with 241 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 297 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is down nine from last week at 543 rigs. A year ago, 592 rigs were active. The count shows that 409 rigs sought oil, down five from the previous week, and 127 explored ...
